description: Analytics and Insights Enhancements (items 41-50): Listening streaks, genre pie chart, peak listening hours heatmap, musical journey timeline, taste compatibility score, monthly wrapped report, discovery stats, longest listening session, genre evolution graph, and achievement badges.
steps: 1. Create lib/streaks.ts and app/components/favorites/analytics/ListeningStreaks.tsx: track consecutive days of listening (check playback-history timestamps). Display streak count with fire emoji and motivational message. Store in localStorage.

2. Enhance app/components/favorites/analytics/GenreAnalytics.tsx: add a visual pie chart (CSS conic-gradient based) showing genre breakdown from listening history. Show percentages and colors per genre.

3. Enhance app/components/favorites/analytics/ListeningHeatmap.tsx: create an hour-by-day heatmap grid (7 days x 24 hours) showing listening intensity. Use data from playback history timestamps. Color cells by intensity.

4. Create app/components/favorites/analytics/MusicalJourney.tsx: visual timeline showing chronological order of first-listened artists from history. Display as a vertical timeline with artwork and dates.

5. Create app/components/favorites/analytics/TasteCompatibility.tsx: generate a 'taste score' by comparing user's top genres against global averages (hardcoded typical distribution). Show as a percentage with radar/spider chart (CSS-based).

6. Create app/components/favorites/analytics/MonthlyWrapped.tsx: Spotify Wrapped-style monthly summary card showing top artist, top song, total hours, genre breakdown, and new discoveries. Styled as a shareable card.
7. Enhance app/components/favorites/analytics/DiscoveryAnalytics.tsx: show stats like 'You discovered X new artists this month' by comparing current month's unique artists vs previous months.
8. Create app/components/favorites/analytics/LongestSession.tsx: track and display the longest continuous listening session from playback history (consecutive plays within 5 min gaps).
9. Enhance app/components/favorites/analytics/TasteEvolution.tsx: show a line/area chart (CSS-based) of how genre percentages have changed month-over-month using listening history.

10. Enhance app/components/favorites/analytics/Achievements.tsx: add a comprehensive badge system - unlock badges for milestones (100 songs played, 50 artists discovered, 7-day streak, genre explorer, etc.). Store earned badges in localStorage.
acceptance_criteria: Listening streak shows consecutive days count with visual flair
Genre pie chart displays visual breakdown with colors per genre
Heatmap shows listening patterns by hour and day of week
Musical journey timeline shows chronological artist discovery
Taste compatibility shows a score comparing to global averages
Monthly wrapped generates a shareable summary card
Discovery stats show new artists/songs discovered this month
Longest session is tracked and displayed with duration
Genre evolution shows changing tastes over time
Achievement badges unlock at milestones and display in profile
verification: bun run lint passes with zero errors
bun run build succeeds with zero errors
